headline: Nothing's good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
summary: The CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is now available for just $69. This budget-friendly device features a 1.43-inch OLED display. The price is significantly lower than its usual $79-$99 range.

headline: Windows 11's big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
summary: Microsoft's latest Windows 11 patch Tuesday introduces key improvements. Users can now pause updates for an extended period, up to 35 days. This feature was previously tested with Windows Insiders.

headline: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI is reportedly planning to launch a ChatGPT smart speaker as its first hardware device. The speaker is expected to be screen-less but will feature a camera and other sensors. This news follows recent legal action against OpenAI by Apple.

headline: SpaceXAI's Grok programming tool was uploading its users' entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was caught uploading full user codebases to Google Cloud. The tool was reportedly sending files it was instructed not to access. SpaceXAI has since disabled the Grok Build CLI after the security flaw was exposed.

headline: FlashForge AD5X Multi-Color 3D Printer drops to $215 shipped at AliExpress
summary: The FlashForge AD5X Multi-Color Mixed Material 3D Printer is now just $215 on AliExpress. This deal offers significant savings compared to its $350 Amazon price. It allows for multi-color and mixed-material 3D printing at a budget price.

headline: Popular Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer drops to $155 shipped
summary: The popular Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer is now available for an incredibly low price of $155, shipped. This budget-friendly printer is praised for producing consistent quality 3D prints. It offers an accessible entry point into 3D printing without a high cost.

headline: Save 50% on Talix 10,000mAh 100W Power Bank, now $18
summary: The airline-friendly Talix 10,000mAh 100W Power Bank is now on sale for just $18, a 50% discount. This powerful bank can fast-charge handheld gaming PCs like the ASUS ROG Ally X. It also offers quick charging for most MacBook models.

headline: Samsung Odyssey OLED G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor drops to $299.99
summary: The Samsung Odyssey OLED G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor is now priced at $299.99 on Amazon. This marks it as one of the least expensive OLED gaming monitors ever seen. Gamers can experience high-quality visuals and fast refresh rates at an unprecedented price.

headline: Midnight social media curfew proposed for older UK teens
summary: A proposal suggests implementing a midnight social media curfew for older teenagers in the UK. Teens would retain the ability to opt out of these restrictions. Campaigners have criticized the measures as being piecemeal and insufficient.

headline: Silky Spain flattens France with special team effort
summary: Spain delivered a dominant performance, decisively defeating France in the World Cup. Their cohesive team strategy proved superior to individual brilliance. Spain, having previously flown under the radar, is now a strong contender for the championship.

headline: Ann Widdecombe killed in 'targeted attack', motive investigated
summary: Police have confirmed that Ann Widdecombe was killed in a 'targeted attack'. Counter-terror police have obtained a warrant to hold a 28-year-old suspect for up to seven days. Authorities are actively investigating the motive behind the fatal incident.

headline: Trump scraps Hormuz fee threat, US resumes Iran port blockade
summary: President Trump has dropped his recent threat of a 20% fee on cargo ships using the Strait of Hormuz. The US has resumed its blockade of Iran's ports. This move continues the US's ongoing efforts to break Iran's control over the crucial waterway.
